description: Research the definition and purpose of a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA).
Identify the legal requirements for conducting a DPIA under GDPR and other relevant regulations.
Outline the steps involved in conducting a DPIA process.
Investigate the key components that should be included in a DPIA report.
Gather examples of templates or frameworks for conducting a DPIA.
Synthesize findings into a structured report outlining the key components of a DPIA process.
